shared_case_surface: memo writeback-act cases that keep runtime closure, reviewed adoption, adopted memo visibility, receipt-facing publication evidence, and recall alignment reviewable on the same bounded owner-local path
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same memo writeback-act integrity question, keeps runtime closure, review, adoption, receipt visibility, and recall alignment explicit, and still covers boundary honesty, review-to-adoption linkage, receipt visibility, and closed-circle recall without turning the bundle into contradiction handling, reviewed-candidate promotion, future scar proof, retention proof, or broad memory-quality grading.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect runtime closure, reviewed anchor, adopted memo surface, and receipt-facing visibility directly
the adopted memo object remains provenance-visible and lifecycle-explicit
receipt or publication visibility stays reviewable when the act is claimed
the writeback act remains weaker than reviewed-candidate promotion or generic live ledger claims
